Day phase before wave 1 Click the village to open the town screen. Click ground for build options, the knight for upgrades, and towers or walls for repairs.
Town phase: click the village or press the Town button to assign villagers and hire soldiers. Towers and walls now cost wood and stone, while upgrades still cost gold.

Controls

WASD moves the mounted knight. Build speed to gain momentum.

The knight fires automatically at nearby enemies. Higher momentum boosts arrow damage.

Once the knight has learned Armor and spear, a fast collision can break enemy lines.

Build only between waves. Right click or Esc cancels placement. Use 1/2/3 to pick towers.

Press Space to start the next wave.

Touch-drag anywhere on the field to move. Tap to click/select. Use in-game buttons for waves, town placement, upgrades, and menus.
